No text, source_id, or URL was invented; every recorded sentence appears verbatim in a real WebSearch snippet returned this session.

atoms.title: Mixture of Sparse Attention: Content-Based Learnable Sparse Attention via Expert-Choice Routing
atoms.text: MoSA selects distinct tokens for each head with expert choice routing providing a content-based sparse attention mechanism.

atoms.title: Load Balancing Mixture of Experts with Similarity Preserving Routers
atoms.text: A learned router computes a distribution over these experts, and assigns input tokens to a small subset.

atoms.title: Gene regulatory logic of the interferon-β enhancer contains multiple selectively deployed modes of transcription factor synergy
atoms.text: Specificity is generated by sigmoidal IRF–DNA binding rather than IRF-NFκB cooperativity, suggesting that the ultrasensitivity mechanism distinguishes the two regulatory modes.
